Surname.en: Armed Librarian of the Magic Academy
Surname.zh: 魔法学院的武装图书管理员

description.en: Attacks an enemy and, with a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52197_0]</color> chance, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52197_0]</color> turns.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自身の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52197_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52197_0]</color>ターンの間UPする。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52197_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52197_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52197_0]</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52197_0]</color>回合内提高自身<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>。

name.jp: 帽子屋さんのティーカップ

description.en: When using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52198_2]</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_2]</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks them.\nAfter attacking, inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52198_3] turn(s)</color> on all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_1]</color> for every target that was inflicted damage.
description.jp: スキル使用時、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52198_2]</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_2]個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃後、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52198_3]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、ダメージを与えた対象の数に応じて自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_1]</color>UPさせる。
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52198_2]</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_2]개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52198_3]턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 감소시키고, 피해를 준 대상마다 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_1]</color> 증가합니다.
description.zh: 使用技能时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52198_2]</color>的几率解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_2]个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。\n攻击后,使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52198_3]回合</color>,且每对1个目标造成伤害,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52198_1]</color>。

name.jp: アリス・イン・ワンダーランド

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52199_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52199_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52199_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52199_0]ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52199_0]</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52199_0]턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52199_0]</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52199_0]回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nIncreases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> proportional to missing Health. <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> can increase up to <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n残りHPが低いほど<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>は最大<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n生命值越低,<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>越高。<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>最多提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>。

description.en:
<color=#28d9ed>Penetration</color> is always increased by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
At end of turn, restores your HP by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>.

At end of turn, reduces the enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color>.
description.jp:
常時、<color=#28d9ed>貫通力</color>が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>上昇する。
ターン終了時、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>回復する。

ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>減少させる。
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

턴 시작 시 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color>회복합니다.
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.zh:
<color=#28d9ed>穿透</color>始终+<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>+<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。
回合结束时,回复自身生命值<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。

回合结束时,降低敌方队伍CP<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
